strengths: Clear identification of three distinct, concrete objects with real-world contexts
Consistent links made between each object and the selected IA prompt
Justifications generally supported by minimal evidence (personal anecdote, bibliographic references)
weaknesses: Explanations often remain descriptive and lack analytical depth and precision
Repetitive reasoning and insufficient synthesis across objects in the conclusion
Inconsistent citation formatting and occasional artefacts (LaTeX fragments)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs band-5 judgment (lower end of the 5â6 range) aligns with the submissionâs clear identification of objects and intelligible prompt links, yet limited precision, repetition and superficial analysis prevent elevation to higher bands. Strengths in contextualisation and evidence support are balanced by descriptive commentary, weak synthesis and inconsistent referencing, making 5/10 the most appropriate final score.

annotations.comment: The choice of IA prompt 33 is clearly indicated, situating the exhibitionâs focus on historical evolution of knowledge. To deepen engagement, restate this prompt in your own words to frame your exploration more explicitly.
Your identification of the typewriter as familial heirloom grounds the object in real context. Highlighting its provenance strengthens the exhibitionâs authenticity.

Context for the Da Vinci tank sketch is identified via a YouTube source, demonstrating connection to a real-world artefact. For improvement, specify why this source is authoritative to strengthen credibility.

The description of Da Vinciâs genius remains largely descriptive. To achieve greater analytical depth, link your observations explicitly to the knowledge question, discussing how imagination translates into tangible advances.
Citation formatting in the footnote is inconsistent and includes stray characters. Adopt a consistent referencing style (e.g., MLA or APA) for all sources to enhance academic rigor.

The explanation of how Da Vinciâs sketch foreshadows modern tanks touches the prompt but lacks precision. Consider discussing specific design elements that reappear in contemporary armoured vehicles.

There is effective discussion of conflict as a driver of innovation. To deepen analysis, interrogate potential counterexamples where peace fostered significant knowledge gains, enriching your perspective.
The link between the typewriter and modern keyboards is credible but remains surface-level. Analyze how design features or typing conventions evolved to meet changing communicative needs.
A sentence is truncated at the page break. Ensure continuity of argument by checking that all sentences and ideas are complete after scanning or layout editing.
Your anecdote about stenography during WWII adds personal insight. To strengthen analysis, connect this historical example directly to the promptâs theme of knowledge inheritance.
The link to freedom of expression is interesting but underdeveloped. Discuss how the typewriter specifically enabled new forms of public discourse rather than generalizing about media.
The citation for the Gallica blog requires a date or ân.d.â format consistently. Uniform referencing builds trust and aligns with IB academic conventions.
The BlueSky TV is situated in a personal and familial context, enhancing authenticity. To improve, specify the era or model year to anchor its historical significance.
The connection between cathode-ray TV and smartphones is valid but descriptive. Examine specific technological continuities, such as screen technology or broadcast standards.
You observe the TVâs role in preserving family history. To elevate your justification, reflect on how this personal memory intersects with collective knowledge preservation in media.

Your concluding paragraph restates earlier points without synthesizing across objects. To improve coherence, compare the three objects directly, highlighting similarities and contrasts in knowledge evolution.
The bibliography header is clear but your list mixes formats and includes misplaced LaTeX. Ensure each entry follows one consistent citation style throughout.
One bibliography entry includes an inline LaTeX fragment â¹\overline{op}âº, which is out of place. Remove code artefacts to maintain professionalism.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
